mapper.insert: insert into `like` (user_id, introduction_id, type, time) values (#{userId}, #{introductionId}, #{type}, NOW())
mapper.delete: delete from `like` where user_id = #{userId} and introduction_id = #{introductionId} and type = #{type}
mapper.select: select count(*) from `like` where user_id = #{userId} and introduction_id = #{introductionId} and type = #{type}
